rationale_for_NB: Device has >10 years market history with established design principles; equivalent devices have extensive clinical data; MDR Article 61(6) applies
source_evidence: Market history documentation, predicate device data
limitations: WET status may not cover all intended use expansions
what_would_trigger_rework_or_human_gate: Novel design features or indication expansion

rationale_for_NB: Device line has pre-MDR certification under MDD; clinical data from legacy devices available; gap analysis identifies MDR-specific requirements
source_evidence: MDD certificate, legacy clinical data, gap analysis
limitations: Legacy data may not cover all GSPR clauses; enhanced PMCF required

rationale_for_NB: RCT demonstrates primary endpoint (p<0.05); CI covers intended population; follow-up adequate for initial approval; PMCF addresses long-term outcomes
source_evidence: RCT results, statistical analysis, PMCF plan
limitations: Subgroup analysis limited; long-term data pending PMCF
what_would_trigger_rework_or_human_gate: p>0.05, insufficient power, missing safety endpoints

source_quote_or_anchor: Decision: Partial equivalence accepted with limitations...
rationale_for_NB: Technical and biological equivalence demonstrated; clinical equivalence partial due to adhesive differences; own data supplements adhesive performance; data access agreement covers summary data
source_evidence: 3-dim comparison, own adhesive data, data access agreement
limitations: Partial equivalence requires strong limitation language; enhanced PMCF for residual uncertainty

rationale_for_NB: No clinical data in target population; literature does not cover intended use; PMCF alone cannot establish efficacy; core claims unsupported
source_evidence: Gap analysis, literature review, PMCF assessment
limitations: Device cannot proceed without CI; development halted
what_would_trigger_rework_or_human_gate: Any core claim without supporting evidence

rationale_for_NB: Technical, biological, and clinical equivalence fully demonstrated; comprehensive comparison table; data access statement available; vigilance comparison shows no safety concerns
source_evidence: 3-dim comparison table, data access statement, vigilance data
what_would_trigger_rework_or_human_gate: Any dimension incomplete or data access missing

source_quote_or_anchor: Decision: PMCF acceptable for recurrence monitoring...
rationale_for_NB: Recurrence is a long-term endpoint not observable in pre-market CI; PMCF registry design adequate for data collection; sample size and follow-up proportionate to gap
source_evidence: PMCF protocol, statistical justification, gap analysis
limitations: PMCF must be implemented within 12 months of approval
what_would_trigger_rework_or_human_gate: PMCF design inadequate or gap severity high

rationale_for_NB: Class III implantable with novel mechanism; long-term durability unknown; safety signals require intensive monitoring; standard PMCF insufficient
source_evidence: Risk analysis, CI limitations, Class III requirements
limitations: Enhanced PMCF must include international registry
what_would_trigger_rework_or_human_gate: Class III + innovation + limited long-term data

source_quote_or_anchor: Decision: Literature sufficient for diagnostic accuracy...
rationale_for_NB: Published studies demonstrate accuracy in representative population; search strategy comprehensive; quality appraisal confirms adequate methodology; no own CI needed
source_evidence: Systematic review, literature appraisal, search documentation
limitations: Literature may not cover all intended use scenarios

source_quote_or_anchor: Decision: Equivalence accepted with vigilance comparison...
rationale_for_NB: 3-dim equivalence demonstrated; vigilance data systematically compared with predicate; no significant safety differences identified; data access agreement comprehensive
source_evidence: Equivalence assessment, vigilance comparison, data access agreement
limitations: Vigilance comparison limited to 3 years post-market
what_would_trigger_rework_or_human_gate: Vigilance differences >10% or serious safety signals

source_quote_or_anchor: Decision: WET not applicable - own data route...
system_decision: WET not applicable - own data route
rationale_for_NB: Device has novel design features not covered by established technology; intended use includes innovative indications; no predicate with comparable features
source_evidence: Technology assessment, design review, SOTA analysis

rationale_for_NB: WET device requires factual presentation with references to established technology; no overstatement permitted; benchmark comparisons optional but recommended
limitations: Tone must not imply superiority over established alternatives

source_quote_or_anchor: Decision: Benefit-risk favorable with indication limitation...
rationale_for_NB: Efficacy demonstrated in defined population; safety profile acceptable; indication narrowed to evidence-supported population; PMCF addresses broader use
source_evidence: Clinical study results, safety data, PMCF plan
what_would_trigger_rework_or_human_gate: Safety concerns or insufficient efficacy in subgroups

source_quote_or_anchor: Decision: Benefit-risk favorable with restenosis monitoring...
rationale_for_NB: Primary patency acceptable at 12 months; restenosis rate within expected range; enhanced PMCF monitors long-term patency; antiplatelet protocol mitigates risk
source_evidence: Patency data, PMCF protocol, risk mitigation

source_quote_or_anchor: Decision: CI mandatory for life-support device...
rationale_for_NB: Life-support function requires robust safety and efficacy demonstration; no equivalence route available; literature insufficient for innovative mechanism; Class III mandates CI
source_evidence: Risk analysis, Class III requirements, literature gap
limitations: CI must be designed for safety endpoints with adequate power
what_would_trigger_rework_or_human_gate: Any life-support or Class III device without CI
